content.text: In the sidebar, you should see four activated buttons:
. You can click on this button to collapse or expand the sidebar. Try it; when the navigator is expanded, you can choose different projects to work in, or create a new one witht he “+” button.
. This button creates a new folder for you project, which you can access through the dashboard.
. This creates a new blob, which you can click to view and edit.
At the very bottom, there is
. You can specify the font style, size, the viewing mode (more on this later), and the color theme.
